# Module: types
**Path**: `/home/veer/Documents/Projects/Studio-Desk/backend/studiodesk/types`
**Last Updated**: 2026-04-12T12:00:00.000Z
**Language**: TypeScript

## Purpose
TypeScript type definitions: auto-generated database schema (80+ tables, 35 enums), Supabase SDK adapter, and hand-curated API-level types.

## Key Files

### `database.ts` (4926 lines)
**Purpose**: Auto-generated PostgreSQL-to-TypeScript mappings (via `pg-to-ts`)

**Exports** — 35 enum types:
| Type | Values (sample) |
|---|---|
| `event_type` | `wedding`, `pre_wedding`, `portrait`, `commercial`, `product` |
| `lead_status` | `new_lead`, `contacted`, `proposal_sent`, `booked`, `lost` |
| `invoice_status` | `draft`, `sent`, `viewed`, `paid`, `partially_paid`, `overdue` |
| `payment_method` | `cash`, `bank_transfer`, `upi`, `razorpay`, `cheque` |
| `user_role` | `owner`, `photographer`, `videographer`, `editor`, `assistant` |
| `plan_tier` | `starter`, `studio`, `agency` |
| `automation_type` | `lead_acknowledgment`, `booking_confirmed`, `gallery_ready` |
| `gallery_status` | `processing`, `published`, `archived`, `expired` |

**Exports** — 80+ table interfaces (Row + Input each):
| Interface | Key Fields |
|---|---|
| `Studios` | `id`, `name`, `slug`, `subscription_status`, `plan_tier` |
| `Bookings` | `id`, `client_id`, `event_date`, `event_type`, `status`, `total_amount`, `gst_type` |
| `Clients` | `id`, `full_name`, `email`, `phone`, `whatsapp`, `source` |
| `Leads` | `id`, `full_name`, `event_type`, `status`, `source`, `estimated_value` |
| `Invoices` | `id`, `invoice_number`, `status`, `total_amount`, `gst_total`, `due_date` |
| `Payments` | `id`, `amount`, `method`, `status`, `transaction_id` |
| `Galleries` | `id`, `booking_id`, `status`, `access_token`, `expires_at` |
| `Contracts` | `id`, `booking_id`, `status`, `signed_at`, `access_token` |
| `Proposals` | `id`, `lead_id`, `status`, `total_amount`, `valid_until` |
| `StudioMembers` | `id`, `studio_id`, `user_id`, `role`, `is_active` |
| `ServicePackages` | `id`, `name`, `base_price`, `event_type`, `is_active` |
| `AutomationLog` | `id`, `studio_id`, `booking_id`, `automation_type`, `channel`, `status` |

**Called By** (Level 1):
- All repositories → `../lib/repositories/.ai.md`
- `supabase.ts` → `./supabase.ts`

### `admin.ts`
**Purpose**: Hand-curated admin API-layer types for platform admin system

**Exports**:
| Type | Purpose |
|---|---|
| `AdminRole` | `'super_admin' | 'support_agent' | 'billing_admin' | 'readonly_analyst'` |
| `PlatformAdmin` | Admin profile (id, name, email, role, is_active, login_count) |
| `AdminSession` | Session record (token, ip, expires_at, revoked_at) |
| `AdminLoginInput` | `{ email, password }` |
| `AdminLoginResult` | `{ admin, session }` |
| `AdminContext` | `{ admin, session_token }` |
| `AuditLogEntry` | Append-only audit log record |
| `FeatureFlag` | Feature flag with tier overrides |
| `PlatformSetting` | Key-value platform config |
| `SupportNote` | Per-studio support note |
| `StudioImpersonation` | Admin impersonation log entry |

### `index.ts` (67 lines)
**Purpose**: Hand-written API-layer types (cleaner PascalCase versions of DB enums)

**Exports**:
| Type | Purpose |
|---|---|
| `ApiResponse<T>` | Standard response envelope: `{ data: T | null, error: string | null, code?: string }` |
| `PaginatedResponse<T>` | Paginated list: `{ data: T[], meta: { count, page, pageSize, totalPages } }` |
| `StudioContext` | Authenticated context: `{ studioId, memberId, role }` |
| `UserRole` | `'owner' | 'photographer' | 'videographer' | 'editor' | 'assistant'` |
| `EventType` | 10 event type values |
| `LeadStatus` | 9 pipeline stage values |
| `InvoiceStatus` | 6 invoice state values |
| `GstType` | `cgst_sgst | igst | exempt` |
| `PaymentMethod` | 9 payment method values |
| `PaymentStatus` | 5 payment state values |

### `supabase.ts` (627 lines)
**Purpose**: Supabase SDK type adapter wrapping `database.ts` types

**Exports**:
- `Database` type → Maps all 80+ tables to `{ Row, Insert, Update, Relationships }` shape
- Includes 7 database views: `v_bookings_overview`, `v_outstanding_invoices`, `v_pending_automations`, `v_platform_studio_health`, `v_studio_storage`, `v_todays_shoots`, `v_unresolved_errors`

**Calls To** (Level 1):
- All types from `database.ts` → `./database.ts`

**Called By** (Level 1):
- All Supabase client creations → `../lib/supabase/.ai.md`
- Repositories importing `Database` → `../lib/repositories/.ai.md`

## Related Modules
- Repositories: `../lib/repositories/.ai.md`
- Services: `../lib/services/.ai.md`
- Supabase: `../lib/supabase/.ai.md`
